proof:
intro x hx
  have h := pow_two_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  field_simp
  linarith
failed_attempts:
intro x hx
  have h : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 = (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)^2 / (2 * x) := by
    field_simp [hx.ne]
    ring_nf
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]
    ring
  linarith [pow_two_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1), h]

intro x hx
  have h : 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x ≤ 2 * x^2 + 1 := by
    have h := pow_two_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)
    rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
    linarith
  field_simp [hx.ne.symm]
  rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
  linarith [h]

sq_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  field_simp [hx.ne.symm]
  linarith

intro x hx
  field_simp [hx.ne.symm]
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1), Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity : 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ))]

sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)
  field_simp [hx.ne.symm]
  nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]

sq_nonneg _
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith)] at h
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  rw [ge_iff_le, div_le_iff (by linarith : 0 < 2 * x)]
  linarith
sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1), hx]

sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)
  field_simp [hx.ne.symm, hx] at *
  ring_nf at h ⊢
  rw [Real.sq_sqrt zero_le_two] at h
  linarith

intro x hx
  field_simp [hx]
  nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt zero_le_two, pow_two_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)]

suffices Real.sqrt 2 ≤ x + 1 / (2 * x) by linarith
  rw [Real.sqrt_le_iff (by positivity)]
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (2 * x ^ 2 - 1)]

sub_nonneg]
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  rw [div_nonneg_iff_of_pos (by linarith), ← Real.sq_sqrt zero_le_two]
  convert pow_two_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1) using 1
  ring

intro x hx
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  nlinarith [pow_two_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1), Real.mul_self_sqrt (zero_le_two : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2)]

intro x hx
  have := Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)
  field_simp [hx.ne]
  nlinarith [pow_two_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)]

sub_nonneg]
  have : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 - (2 - x - 1 / (2 * x)) = (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)^2 / (2 * x) := by
    field_simp [hx.ne']
    rw [← Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
    ring
  rw [this]
  positivity

simp [hx.ne, Real.sqrt_div] at h
  linarith [Real.div_sqrt zero_le_two]

sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt zero_le_two] at h
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  linarith

intro x hx
  field_simp [hx.ne]
  nlinarith [pow_two_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1), Real.sq_sqrt zero_le_two]

sub_nonneg]
  have : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 - (2 - x - 1 / (2 * x)) = (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)^2 / (2 * x) := by
    field_simp [hx.ne']
    rw [mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]
    ring
  rw [this]
  positivity

sq_nonneg _
  ring_nf at h ⊢
  rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith)] at h
  linarith

sub_nonneg, this]
  positivity

simp [hx.ne] at h
  rw [sqrt_div zero_le_one (by positivity), sqrt_one, mul_one_div, div_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  linarith

simp [hx.ne'] at h
  rw [sqrt_div (by norm_num) (by norm_num), div_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  linarith

sq_nonneg _
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  ring_nf at h ⊢
  rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  linarith

intro x hx
  have h := pow_two_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  nlinarith

sq_nonneg _
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  rw [ge_iff_le, ← sub_sub, sub_le_sub_left_iff, le_sub_iff_add_le, ← le_div_iff (by positivity)]
  linarith

sq_nonneg _
  field_simp [hx.ne]
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt zero_le_two] at h
  linarith

suffices x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 by linarith
  have h : 2 * x * (x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2) = (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)^2 := by
    field_simp [hx.ne.symm]; rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]; ring
  linarith [h, sq_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)]
successful_attempts:
intro x hx
  have h := pow_two_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)] at h
  field_simp
  linarith

intro x hx
  have hx2 : 0 < 2 * x := by linarith
  have h : (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)^2 = 2 * x^2 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x + 1 := by
    ring_nf; rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]; ring
  rw [ge_iff_le, ← mul_le_mul_right hx2]
  field_simp
  linarith [sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1), h]

intro x hx
  have h : (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1) ^ 2 = 2 * x ^ 2 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x + 1 := by
    ring_nf
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]
    ring
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  linarith [sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)]

intro x hx
  have h := pow_two_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)
  rw [sub_pow_two, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith)] at h
  field_simp [hx.ne.symm]
  linarith

intro x hx
  have h : 0 ≤ (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)^2 := pow_two_nonneg _
  field_simp [hx.ne']
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt zero_le_two] at h
  linarith
